metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4633
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1a. In situ mRNA hybridization of early postnatal and mature mouse hippocampus showed Slit2 expression is confined to CA3.

Figure 1d. Westernblots show Slit2 was enriched in crude synaptic membrane and presynaptic subcellular fractions, but not the postsynaptic fraction.

Figure S8a. Pulldown with recombinant Slit2-Fc protein in purified synaptosome fractions from P21 rat brains followed by shotgun mass-spectrometry identified several cell surface adhesion proteins; Nrxn1-3, PlexinA1, Ncam1, Glypican1, L1cam, Robo2.

Further, functional assays show that Robo2 induces excitatory synapse formation in a Slit-dependent manner (fig. 3). Authors suggest that in the tripartite Robo2-Slit2-Neurexin trans-synaptic complex promoting excitatory (but not inhibitory) synapse formation, Slit2 interacts with Robo2 but not Neurexin.

Note that Slit-Robo binding in context of growth cone repulsion is already well established (e.g. PMID:10197527). Slit is known to be a secreted extracellular matrix protein (PMID:10102267), hence the inferred annotation to perisynaptic ECM.. Experimental description: "Affinity chromatography experiments were performed as previously described (Savas et al., 2014). Crude synaptosome extracts were prepared from ten P21-22 rat brains, homogenized ..."

"Fc-Protein Purification for Mass-spectrometry
Fc protein purification was performed as described previously (Savas et al., 2014). Slit2-Fc (N-(aa1-840) and C-terminal (aa841-1290) fragments) proteins were produced by transient transfection of HEK293T cells using PEI (Polysciences). Six hours after transfection, media was changed to OptiMEM (Invitrogen) and harvested 5 days later. Conditioned media was centrifuged, sterile-filtered and run over a fast-flow Protein-G agarose (Thermo-Fisher) column. After extensive washing with wash buffer (50 mM HEPES pH 7.4, 300 mM NaCl and protease inhibitors), the column was eluted with Pierce elution buffer. Eluted fractions containing proteins were pooled and dialyzed with PBS using a Slide-A-Lyzer (Pierce) and concentrated using Amicon Ultra centrifugal units (Millipore). The integrity and purity of the purified ecto-Fc proteins was confirmed with SDS-PAGE and Coomassie staining, and concentration was determined using a Bradford protein assay."
